workflow.name: PM Dashboard & Orchestrator
workflow.critical: Present clear status and recommend the SINGLE best next action

step.action: Parse ALL entries: epics (epic-N) and stories (N-N-name) with their statuses
For each epic in-progress or backlog: - Count stories by status: backlog, ready-for-dev, in-progress, review, done - Calculate progression: X/Y stories done

Determine priority order: 1. Story in "review" → recommend /review (unblock the pipeline) 2. Story in "in-progress" → recommend /dev (continue work) 3. Story in "ready-for-dev" → recommend /dev (start next) 4. Epic with all stories "done" → recommend /retro 5. Story in "backlog" → recommend /story (create next) 6. No stories left → recommend creating new epic in planning
